bundles.name: FREEDOM_PACKAGE
bundles.description: A mortgage package offering interest rate savings and fee waivers on the home loan and other financial services.

constraints.additionalInfo: LVR up to 80% for Owner Occupied loans. LVR up to 90% for Investment loans

fees.name: ESTABLISHMENT_FEE_-_LINE_OF_CREDIT
fees.additionalInfo: To cover our costs associated with establishing your loan. Waived for Freedom Package loans

fees.name: PRINCIPAL_INCREASE_FEE_-_LINE_OF_CREDIT
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when we process your request to increase the principal amount of your loan. Waived for Freedom Package loans

fees.name: PROGRESS_PAYMENT_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Payable on the first drawdown after settlement to cover the administration costs of progress payments for your construction or home renovation

fees.name: SETTLEMENT_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when we process the settlement of your loan. Waived for Freedom Package loans

fees.name: VALUATION_FEE_-_NEW_LOANS_&_LOAN_INCREASES
fees.additionalInfo: Initial Valuation Fee included in Establishment Fee up to $300 (total per application). Initial Valuation Fee included in Package Fee up to $400 (total per application), subsequent Valuation Fees (eg. additional loans) included in Package Fee up to $300 (total per application).

fees.name: LENDERS_MORTGAGE_INSURANCE_PREMIUM
fees.additionalInfo: Premium varies according to the amount borrowed and the valuation of the secured property/s - an estimate will be provided after the security valuation is received

fees.name: PROPERTY_INSPECTION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Charged at Cost. Covers the cost of us arranging independent inspection on a property under construction or renovation.

fees.name: DOCUMENT_PREPARATION_COSTS_AND_THIRD_PARTY_COSTS
fees.additionalInfo: Charged at Cost. May apply where we need to engage external solicitors to prepare the mortgage documents. Covers the cost of documentation preparation, Government charges etc.

fees.name: PACKAGE_FEE_-_FREEDOM_PACKAGE
fees.additionalInfo: Annual mortgage package fee entitles you to benefits such as discounts & fee waivers on your home loan or line of credit, transaction accounts, credit card etc.

fees.name: ACCOUNT_SERVICE_FEE_-_LINE_OF_CREDIT
fees.additionalInfo: Payable for managing your account. Waived for Freedom Package loans

fees.name: BASIC_VARIATION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Plus third party costs if applicable. Payable when we process your request to change or restructure your repayment

fees.name: COMPLEX_VARIATION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Plus any applicable break costs and third party costs if applicable. Payable when we process your request that varaies your product, security, interest rate or repayment type, unless switching to Principal & Interest payments. Waived for Freedom Package loans when changing interest rate and or interest type

fees.name: VALUATION_FEE_-_POST_SETTLEMENT
fees.additionalInfo: Charged at Cost. Payable to cover the cost of us arranging an independent valuation report (which we may do at any time acting reasonably).

fees.name: DEFAULT_ADMINISTRATION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Charged per month, if you fail to make a payment by the due date

fees.name: CONDITIONS_SUBSEQUENT_COSTS
fees.additionalInfo: Charges vary - Charged at Cost. May apply to reimburse us the costs associated with confirming compliance with any special conditions in your loan agreement, such as the charges from third parties to provide reports to us.

fees.name: RTGS_OUTWARD_PAYMENT_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Payable each time you request a high value, time critical payment from your account to another financial institution on a real time basis for    same day    payment

fees.name: EMERGENCY_CARD/EMERGENCY_CASH_DISBURSEMENT_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Unascertainable - as quoted by Visa Global Customer Assistance Service.

fees.name: DOCUMENT_PREPARATION_COSTS_AND_THIRD_PARTY_COSTS_-_POST_SETTLEMENT
fees.additionalInfo: Unacertainable - Are costs reasonably incurred by us in providing the service and include such costs as legal costs, document custodian charges, titles office fees, and electronic processing fees.

fees.name: MORTGAGE_RELEASE_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Plus third party costs if applicable. Payable per mortgage when we process your request to release a security from your loan, including a partial release. Third party costs may also be payable

fees.name: CHEQUE_WITHDRAWAL_USING_CHEQUE_BOOK
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when you write a cheque and it is presented on your account

fees.name: DEPOSIT_FOREIGN_CURRENCY_CHEQUE_DRAFT_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: If cheque is greater than $5,000 or issuing bank is required to clear and settle cheque fee is $50. Payable each time a foreign currency/draft is deposited.

fees.name: RTGS_OUTWARD_PAYMENT_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Payable each time you request a high value, time critical payment from your account to another financial institution on a real time basis for    same day    payment

fees.name: TELEGPRAPHIC_TRANSFER_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: $AU cuurency $50 per transfer OR foreign currency $30 per transfer. Payable each time you request an electronic transmission of funds to an account at an overseas bank.

fees.name: ATM_DIRECT_CHARGE_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Direct charge fee is levied by the ATM owner. May be payable to the ATM owner when using your card to withdraw or check your balance at a non-Auswide Bank ATM network ATM.

fees.name: FOREIGN_ATM_WITHDRAWAL_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Plus 3% Currency Conversion Fee. Payable when you use your Visa Debit Card at any oversas ATM to withdraw from your account

fees.name: CURRENCY_CONVERSION_FEE
fees.additionalInfo: Payable when you use your card to pay for purchases or withdraw cash at overseas retail outlets or overseas ATM

fees.name: DISHONOUR_FEE_-_DIRECT_DEBIT_AND_EXTERNAL_PAYMENT
fees.additionalInfo: Charged per rejection. Payable when you've arranged a direct debit payment or external payment to an account at another financial institution but there are insufficient clear funds in your account

detail.name: LINE OF CREDIT
detail.description: A line of credit allows you to borrow against the equity in your home, with the flexibility to draw up toyour approved credit limit.
